message:
feat(pipeline): Expand LLM integration and refine curation/validation

Enhances the ACE pipeline components for LLM-driven operations:

## LLM Module (src/llm.ts) +163 lines

Major expansion of LLM integration capabilities:

- ADDED: runReflector(prompt, config) - Structured output for delta extraction
- ADDED: runValidator(content, evidence, config) - Validation reasoning
- ADDED: extractDiary(schema, content, metadata, config) - Diary generation
- ADDED: generateSearchQueries(content, config) - Query expansion for cass
- IMPROVED: Error handling with graceful fallbacks
- IMPROVED: Provider initialization with lazy loading

All LLM functions use Vercel AI SDK generateObject() for type-safe
structured output with Zod schemas.

## Curate Module (src/curate.ts) - Minor adjustments

- Refined delta application logic
- Improved error messages for rejected deltas
- Better handling of edge cases in merge operations

## Validate Module (src/validate.ts) - Minor fixes

- Adjusted import paths for module resolution
- Fixed type annotations for better inference

These modules form the middle layers of the ACE pipeline:
Generator → Reflector → [Validator] → [Curator] → Playbook

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
